title: Bridge Essay: Neural pathway in the right hemisphere underlies verbal insight problem solving.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Knowledge/Gnosis** (Phase 14) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Knowledge/Gnosis to mechanistic neuroscience through Neural, pathway, in, the, right.

**Neural pathway in the right hemisphere underlies verbal insight problem solving.** — Neuroscience. PMID: 24161281. DOI: 10.1016/j.neuroscience.2013.10.019. Verbal insight problem solving means to break mental sets, to select the novel semantic information and to form novel, task-related associations. Although previous studies have identified the brain regions associated with these key processes, the interaction among these regions during insight is still unclear. In the present study, we explored the functional connectivity between the key regions during solving Chinese 'chengyu' riddles by using event-related functional magnetic resonance imaging.
